arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano confirms Victor Osimhen’s Man Utd stance
arts.sum: Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Victor Osimhen is open to discussing a summer transfer to Manchester United .

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd v Ipswich Town on TV tonight - live stream details
arts.sum: Coverage for Manchester United v Ipswich begins at 6.30pm.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim defends much-criticised Red Devils star amid talk of summer exit
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim throws his support behind Rasmus Hojlund amid the ongoing criticism surrounding the centre-forward, who is being linked with a move to Napoli.

arts.ttl: Man United plan money-spinning post-season trip to Asia amid Ruben Amorim "engine" claim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United could be set to follow Tottenham and Newcastle in planning post-season friendlies following their controversial trip to Australia last May

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Ipswich live early team news plus how to watch and kick-off time
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from Old Trafford as Man United take on Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: One more year! Man Utd suffer blow as belligerent star refuses to leave
arts.sum: Amorim is set to run into a long-term Casemiro-sized problem at Old Trafford, with the veteran midfield star refusing to accept a transfer unless his extravagant salary demands are met, TeamTalk reports. Although a player who is still capable of turning in world-class displays at 33, these have become increasingly rare for the former Real Madrid man, whose influence has been on the wane since Amorim took command at Old Trafford in November.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes telling Liverpool admission in Manchester United £85m transfer reprieve
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has been heavily criticised on Merseyside with the forward previously linked with a transfer to Man United.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's subtle swipe at Cristiano Ronaldo and Marcus Rashford over Man Utd strops
arts.sum: Former Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has spoken out about his Old Trafford departure and appears to have aimed a dig at the likes of Cristiano Ronaldo and Marcus Rashford

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd should have appointed Kieran McKenna instead of Ruben Amorim as boss
arts.sum: Manchester United spoke to former coach Kieran McKenna back in May when they were considering replacements for Erik ten hag - and now they look lost under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Revealed: Premier League table since Ruben Amorim took the Man United job - and it's worrying reading for Red Devils fans
arts.sum: Though his side have safely negotiated the early rounds of both the FA Cup and Europa League, it is the Premier League that has been proving a more difficult frontier to conquer.
